instances.prompt: Instrumental only. 95 BPM, D sharp major. Detroit boom bap hip hop intro for sports documentary. Warm ethereal soul chord loop, filtered, slowly revealing dusty drum break with unquantized MPC swing, kick behind beat, snare slightly early. Subtle vinyl crackle. Sparse moody tension. Intensity builds then fades to silence.
